title: rubus × singularis
intro: Rubus × singularis, also known as the loganberry, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between a blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and a raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The medicinal properties of the loganberry plant have been utilized in traditional medicine for their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The loganberry is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, providing various health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Loganberries can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, allowing for convenient and versatile use in herbal medicine.
